privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified and consistent. The task is completely synthetic with infrastructure created by setup_task.sh. Expected values: Docker Swarm stack named 'acme-tools' with project directory at /home/ga/projects/acme-platform. Custom Docker images acme-web:1.0 and acme-api:1.0 must be built. Service configuration requires 3 replicas for web service, 2 for api, 1 each for db and cache. Web service must have rolling update policy with parallelism of 1 and 10-second delay. Both web and api services require 256MB memory limits. Application must be accessible at http://localhost:8080 serving HTML containing 'AcmeCorp'.
